---
name: Meeting Notes Template
about: Document and upload weekly meeting notes
title: "Upload Weekly Meeting Notes to Wiki: Week XX"
labels: []
assignees: []
---

## 1. Description
Write the notes from the weekly project meeting and upload them to the Wiki so the team has a shared record of discussions, decisions, and action items.

## 2. Tasks / Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Collect notes from the meeting
- [ ] Write them in the meeting notes format
- [ ] Review briefly with the team
- [ ] Upload to the Wiki

## 3. Dependencies
- Related to: Project documentation

## 4. Deliverables
- Wiki page containing the weekly meeting notes

## 5. Notes
This issue should be created for each weekly meeting.
